entity.name: Bharathkumar
entity.description: Open-source maintainer building developer tools focused on terminal productivity, CLI snippet management, and sustainable developer experience. Creator and long-term maintainer of snip.

projects.name: snip
projects.description:
snip is a fast, cross-platform CLI snippet manager for developers who live in the terminal. It saves, searches, and executes reusable code and shell snippets across any language — with safety rails, a split-pane TUI, fuzzy search, parameterized templates, and GitHub Gist sync.

Unlike shell-only snippet tools, snip handles multi-language execution (JS, Python, Ruby, Bash, etc.), auto-detects dangerous commands, and integrates into unix pipelines. It supports dual storage backends (JSON for simplicity, SQLite for scale) and requires zero configuration to start.

Actively maintained with community contributions and stability-focused releases.

channels.description: Sponsor via GitHub Sponsors — supports recurring and one-time contributions.
